assertions.assertion: Response configures ForwardedHeadersOptions with ForwardedHeaders including XForwardedProto to restore the original HTTPS scheme
assertions.rationale: Lines 23-29 configure ForwardedHeadersOptions with ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedHost | ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto.

assertions.assertion: Response calls UseForwardedHeaders() early in the pipeline, before UseIdentityServer()
assertions.rationale: Line 36 calls UseForwardedHeaders() before line 40 UseIdentityServer().

assertions.assertion: Response mentions the ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED=true environment variable as a simpler alternative for cloud/Kubernetes
assertions.rationale: Explicitly describes 'ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED=true' as a simpler alternative and mentions cloud/Kubernetes.

assertions.assertion: Response explains that the reverse proxy strips the original scheme and host headers, causing IdentityServer to generate HTTP URLs in discovery
assertions.rationale: Explains 'The reverse proxy terminates TLS and forwards requests as HTTP internally. Without ForwardedHeaders, IdentityServer sees HTTP and generates HTTP URLs in the discovery document.'
